title: O emiris kai o kakomoiris
writer: Asimakis Gialamas, Giorgos Lazaridis, Kostas Pretenteris
actors: Mimis Fotopoulos, Giorgos Pantzas, Eleni Prokopiou
plot: An Arab monarch arrives in Athens accompanied by his wife and his beautiful daughter, who falls in love with a charming background actor. Of course, the princess is unaware of his innocent ruse. What will happen when the truth com...
